rationale_en: A single note added to one bylaw article is routine trade-licensing housekeeping with no expected effect on aggregate export or import volumes.
This is an ex-post compensation/relief mechanism for drought damage, not an input to crop production, so it has no expected channel to yield or output measures.
A routine bylaw amendment to the trade-licensing framework, procedural upkeep with no expected effect on aggregate trade flows.
Sets pricing/payment mechanics for privatized shares, a narrow administrative procedure rather than a driver of aggregate market capitalization or listing counts.
A corrective letter fixing wording in one bylaw article is pure regulatory housekeeping with no expected effect on trade flows.
A routine multi-article bylaw amendment during trade reopening, part of the regulatory backdrop but too small to expect a visible effect on trade totals.
Governs the sale of smuggled goods, a narrow niche revenue stream that is negligible against total taxes collected on international trade.
An executive bylaw implementing a single clause of one year's budget law is downstream administrative machinery, not itself a driver of the budget totals.
Adds one note to one article of the Mining Act bylaw, a narrow procedural tweak with no expected effect on province-level mine production value.
A narrow bylaw implementing one budget clause tied to trade, administrative in nature with no expected material effect on trade taxes or imports.
Routine amendment to the standing trade-licensing bylaw, procedural upkeep with no expected effect on aggregate trade volumes.
Adds a single article to the trade-licensing bylaw during post-war reconstruction, routine regulatory backdrop rather than a driver of trade totals.
Implements a genuine dedicated post-war reconstruction tax, a real but modest addition to the tax base, one of many instruments feeding total tax revenue.
Sets professional-qualification standards for financial institution managers, a governance rule with no expected channel to market capitalization or trading value.
Market-making rules are designed specifically to improve liquidity and turnover, a real but partial effect on trading activity alongside larger macro drivers of volume.
Establishes market-making at a niche OTC venue, a real but small contributor to listed-company counts and trading value relative to the main exchange.
Keeping electricity distributors under state ownership shapes long-run efficiency incentives, a real but indirect and partial force on grid losses and access.
A narrow tax-base exemption for asset revaluation surpluses, small relative to aggregate income tax and negligible against total tax revenue.
Allocates resources including fertilizer and irrigation support meant to raise farm productivity, a real but partial channel among several government agricultural programs.
A technical amendment to an already-narrow productivity bylaw, its own marginal effect on crop or fertilizer measures is too small to expect a visible impact.
A narrow fiscal-technical mechanism for earmarked revenue outside the ordinary budget cycle, one of many minor rules with no expected effect on aggregate revenue.
A procedural rule for how state-sector purchases open letters of credit, administrative housekeeping with no expected effect on imports or the exchange rate.
A single bank's bond issuance authorization is one small financing tranche, negligible against aggregate private-sector credit or the housing stock.
Strengthens the reserve fund of one export-credit insurer, a real but indirect and marginal channel to aggregate merchandise exports.
Governs contract-approval procedures for major oil deals, shaping investment terms with a real but indirect and slow-moving effect on future production and rents.
A narrow amendment strengthening banks' claims-collection powers, marginal to sector-wide credit growth to the private sector.
An early, narrow local municipal tax instrument from 1935, included for historical context only with no expected effect on modern tax-to-GDP ratios.
Establishes the listing framework for a new OTC market tier that materially expanded the pool of listable firms, a real but partial driver of aggregate market size measures.
Sets trading rules for the smallest, junior tier within an OTC market, a marginal addition to listed-company counts or trading value.
Establishes futures trading that shapes gold-coin price discovery and volatility, a real but partial channel alongside global gold prices and the exchange rate as the fundamental drivers.
Adds a niche commodity exchange for energy-linked instruments, a marginal contribution to aggregate market capitalization or trading value.
Sets a trivial foreign-currency allowance for traveling officials, negligible against the overall determinants of the exchange rate.
Authorizes implementation of the Consortium agreement governing crude export volumes and terms during the early-1970s oil boom, a major but partial force since global prices also drove the boom.
A narrow charter amendment for the Agricultural Bank, an indirect institutional tweak too small to expect a visible effect on farm credit or crop output.
Amends the core national Water Nationalization Law governing state allocation of water resources, a real and material force on irrigation and agricultural water use nationwide.
A single-product customs exemption for sheet glass, negligible against the broad tariff schedule shaping aggregate imports and customs revenue.
Directly caps mortgage loan amounts right after bank nationalization, a real rationing instrument but one force among the broader post-nationalization credit regime.
A minor administrative extension of the trade-regulation bylaw into mining production units, procedural with no expected effect on mining output.
Sets emergency trading-halt procedures invoked only occasionally, a real stability mechanism but not a driver of structural market-cap or turnover trends.
One state-credit channel for industrial engineering projects, a small program among the broader post-war investment landscape.
Redistributes already-collected oil revenue to producing provinces within the existing budget, a reallocation rather than an addition to budget totals.
Adds one note to one article of an annual trade bylaw, purely procedural with no expected effect on trade flows.
This decree directly replaces the entire import-duty tariff schedule, it is the legal instrument that defines the applied tariff-rate series for that year.
Governs sale terms and pricing of state-extracted minerals, not a lever on production volumes, so no expected effect on mining output.
A narrow clause revision to free-trade-zone land-use incentives, marginal against province-level foreign investment inflows.
This decision directly resets the import-duty tariff schedule tables, it is the legal instrument that defines the applied tariff-rate series for that year.
Inserts wording into a bylaw, purely procedural with no expected effect on trade flows.
Implements one article of the participation-bonds law for a sharia-compliant bond segment, small relative to Iran's equity-dominated capital market as a whole.
A court ruling annulling one administrative distribution directive, narrow and procedural with no expected effect on aggregate fuel consumption or production.
A court ruling on an institutional export-council decision, a narrow procedural matter with no expected effect on export flows.
Directly annuls part of the circular that sets Social Security pension payout amounts, a real and material but partial effect on the specific pension-payment series.
A later court ruling on implementing decades-old land reform touches the domain of agricultural land structure but is procedural clarification, not the reform itself.
Land reform is historically central to Iran's growth story, but this document is only a court ruling on implementation details with no expected channel to aggregate GDP.
A ruling on water/wastewater tariff conditions touches one small administered price among the vast CPI basket, too narrow to expect a visible price effect.
A ruling on a farm-sector electricity/water tariff circular touches input costs narrowly, too small to expect a visible effect on agricultural value added.
A 1995 ruling on Post Company telecom tariffs is a single narrow sectoral price with negligible weight in aggregate inflation measures.
Permanently earmarks a recurring share of oil revenue for provincial development, a real but partial force since it is one of several mechanisms shaping provincial and total budget execution.
Formalizes property titles for land-reform-affected land, a real but gradual and partial driver of the national housing-tenure classification.
The property-rights leg of land reform can support formal credit and investment, a real but diffuse and slow-moving force on aggregate GDP and agricultural value added.
Expands the legal basis for government bond financing as an alternative to central-bank borrowing, a real but partial force since it is one financing tool among several shaping government debt.
Mandates consolidating state poultry firms, a real restructuring of the state-owned segment but partial against total poultry production which includes substantial private output.
Directly revises the statutory pay schedule for a large public-sector workforce, a real and material but partial force on economy-wide compensation of employees.
A narrow implementation detail of tenant-farmer land conversion within the broader land-reform story, with no expected channel to aggregate GDP or agricultural value added.
Merely extends statutory deadlines for tenant-farmer land conversion, an administrative detail with no expected effect on GDP or agricultural value added.
Legally forces execution of earmarked spending on rural gas connections, a real and material but partial driver since it is one year's funding within a multi-year gasification program.
Directly funds hospital budget shortfalls and health-network expansion, a real and material but partial driver of that period's hospital-bed capacity and government health spending.

Sets the duty rate for automobiles, a heavily-weighted, high-tariff product category in Iran, giving it a real and material but partial expected effect on the weighted-mean tariff for manufactured products.
A duty-rate change for one product category is a real but marginal contributor to total customs revenue, which is collected across many products.
Opens mineral extraction and sale to the private sector, a foundational regulatory change with a real but gradual and partial effect on mining output alongside continued state-sector production.
Alters the legal basis for a specific water/wastewater tariff clause within the housing-utilities COICOP subgroup, a real but partial effect confined to that one price component.
A ruling on one utility tariff clause has a marginal, diffuse effect on aggregate inflation next to far larger drivers like the exchange rate and liquidity growth.
The annual national budget act is the legal instrument that directly defines that year's government revenue and expenditure totals.
One year's routine national budget is part of the fiscal backdrop to Iran's wartime-era GDP path, but a single year's budget is a small force against the whole economy.
The annual national budget act is the legal instrument that directly defines that year's government revenue and expenditure totals.
Part of the fiscal backdrop to late-1940s Iran, but one year's routine budget is a small force against aggregate GDP.
The annual national budget act is the legal instrument that directly defines that year's government revenue and expenditure totals.
Part of the pre-nationalization fiscal backdrop, but one year's routine budget is a small force against aggregate GDP.
The annual national budget act is the legal instrument that directly defines that year's government revenue and expenditure totals.
Part of the fiscal backdrop as the Consortium Agreement restored oil exports, but one year's routine budget is a small force against aggregate GDP.
The annual national budget act is the legal instrument that directly defines that year's government revenue and expenditure totals.
Part of the Second Development Plan's fiscal backdrop, but one year's routine budget is a small force against aggregate GDP.
The annual national budget act is the legal instrument that directly defines that year's government revenue and expenditure totals.
Part of the fiscal backdrop on the cusp of the 1970s oil boom, but one year's routine budget is a small force against aggregate GDP.
A supplementary budget directly raising authorized wartime spending is a major fiscal instrument with an expected material effect on that year's government finance totals.
Part of the wartime fiscal expansion backdrop, but a single supplementary budget is a small force against aggregate GDP alongside war destruction and oil-export disruption.
Deficit-financed wartime supplementary spending is a documented contributor to inflation, but one force among several including the exchange rate and monetary base.
A textual correction to an amendment of budget figures still touches the government finance totals, but as a correction of a correction its independent effect is modest.
A wording correction to a wartime budget amendment is too minor and technical to expect any effect on aggregate GDP.
A wording correction to a budget amendment is too far removed from monetary conditions to expect any effect on inflation.
A substantive amendment revising the first post-ceasefire budget act's revenue and expenditure figures is a major instrument with an expected material effect on that year's government finance totals.
Part of the fiscal reorientation toward reconstruction, but one budget amendment is a small force against aggregate GDP.
Post-war reconstruction spending financed partly through deficits is a documented contributor to early-1990s inflation, but one force among several.
This is an ex-post accounting certification of actual budget outturns, a reporting record rather than an instrument that itself causes revenue or expenditure levels.
A narrow clause addition to a free-trade-zone fee bylaw, small relative to aggregate national trade flows.
A drought-compensation relief transfer mechanism, narrow and downstream of production shocks rather than a driver of agricultural output.
Governs sale terms for a slice of subsidized low-cost housing, too narrow to expect a visible effect on census-measured household counts.
A routine amendment to the trade-licensing bylaw, procedural upkeep with no expected effect on customs revenue.
A routine amendment to the trade-licensing bylaw, procedural upkeep with no expected effect on customs revenue.
A narrow clause-level correction to one bylaw note, purely procedural with no expected effect on customs revenue.
A narrow clause-level correction to one bylaw note, purely procedural with no expected effect on customs revenue.
